Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's motion for order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
